GS

Research Scientist

Yu-Chin
Chan

ML, physics simulation, and engineering design. Building tools that make complex systems tractable.

View Projects About ↓

About

Research scientist working at the intersection of machine learning, physics-based simulation, and engineering design. PhD from Northwestern in computational metamaterials; now building ML and simulation workflows for industrial design problems.

Outside work: tinkering with desktop and mobile tooling, and writing fantasy fiction.

Education

  • Northwestern University

    Ph.D. Mechanical Engineering

    2016 – 2021

    IDEAL Group · Advisor: Prof. Wei Chen

  • NC State University

    B.S. Mechanical Engineering (Honors)

    2011 – 2015

    Minor Mathematics · Summa Cum Laude

Awards

  • NSF Graduate Research Fellowship 2018
  • Paper of Distinction — ASME IDETC DAC 2020
  • Paper of Distinction — ASME IDETC DAC 2017
  • Predictive Science & Engineering Design Fellowship, Northwestern 2017
  • Walter P. Murphy Fellowship, Northwestern 2016

Publications

Selected works

  • Data-driven metamaterial design with Laplace-Beltrami spectrum as “shape-DNA”

    Liwei Wang, Yu-Chin Chan, Zhao Liu, Ping Zhu, Wei Chen · Structural and Multidisciplinary Optimization · 2020

    2020
  • A novel gripper for multiaxial mechanical testing of microtubes at elevated temperatures

    Lin Li, Yu-Chin Chan, Gracious Ngaile, Tasnim Hassan · Review of Scientific Instruments · 2020

    2020
  • METASET: Exploring Shape and Property Spaces for Data-Driven Metamaterials Design

    Yu-Chin Chan, Faez Ahmed, Liwei Wang, Wei Chen · · 2020

    2020
  • Deep Generative Modeling for Mechanistic-based Learning and Design of Metamaterial Systems

    Liwei Wang, Yu-Chin Chan, Faez Ahmed, Zhao Liu, Ping Zhu, Wei Chen · · 2020

    2020
  • Robust topology optimization of multi-material lattice structures under material and load uncertainties

    Chan Y, Shintani K, Chen W · Frontiers of Mechanical Engineering · 2019

    2019
  • Gaussian Process Emulation for Big Data in Data-Driven Metamaterials Design

    Bostanabad R, Chan Y, Wang L, Zhu P, Chen W · ASME 2019 IDETC/CIE · 2019

    2019
  • Globally Approximate Gaussian Processes for Big Data with Application to Data-Driven Metamaterials Design

    Bostanabad R, Chan Y, Wang L, Zhu P, Chen W · Journal of Mechanical Design · 2019

    2019
  • Data-Driven Prediction of Mechanical Properties in Support of Rapid Certification of Additively Manufactured Alloys

    Yan F, Chan Y, Saboo A, Shah J, Olson G, Chen W · Computer Modeling in Engineering & Sciences · 2018

    2018
  • Enhanced Gaussian process metamodeling and collaborative optimization for vehicle suspension design optimization

    Tao S, Shintani K, Bostanabad R, Chan Y, Yang G, Meingast H, Chen W · ASME 2017 IDETC/CIE · 2017

    2017
